---
title: Dashboard Template
description: Product-facing starter with a polished dashboard, marketing page, and dark design system.
---

The `dashboard` template builds on `blank` with a rich UI layer that demonstrates real SaaS patterns.

## What's added over blank

- **Marketing landing page** — hero, bento feature grid, pricing section, CTA, footer
- **Dashboard shell** — sidebar navigation, header, responsive layout
- **Overview cards** — stats and metrics demonstration
- **Activity feed** — table/list patterns
- **Settings pages** — form patterns with validation
- **Dark design system** — noise textures, gradient orbs, micro-animations
- **Auth form** — Fennec-style with sign-in/sign-up tabs, icon inputs, password toggle

## Modules included

Everything from `blank`, plus:

- `dashboard-shell` — custom CSS theme layer + settings page override
- `auth-github` — GitHub OAuth (if `--auth email-password+github`)

## Design system

The dashboard template uses a dark-first design system with:

- **Colors**: Deep blacks (#09090b), cool neutrals, teal accent (#00d4aa)
- **Typography**: Satoshi (display) + General Sans (body)
- **Effects**: Glass morphism borders, gradient orbs, subtle noise texture
- **Animations**: Fade-in reveals, smooth transitions, hover states
- **Layout**: Bento grid cards, pricing cards with consistent spacing and border-radius

## When to use

- Building a product with a dashboard interface
- You want a polished starting point to customize
- You want to demonstrate what the product will look like to stakeholders
